category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Uzbekistan O'zStandart certification, O'zDSt/IEC safety, and national energy programme requirements.

title.en: China-to-Uzbekistan Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入乌兹别克斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入烏茲別克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Uzbekistan market-access requirements: O'zStandart mandatory certification/declaration, O'zDSt/IEC 60335-2-24 safety, national energy efficiency programmes, R-600a refrigerant handling, and in-country importer obligations under the national (non-EAEU) regulatory regime.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与乌兹别克斯坦市场准入要求对照：O'zStandart强制认证/声明、O'zDSt/IEC 60335-2-24安全标准、国家能效计划、R-600a制冷剂处理及在该国（非欧亚经济联盟）监管制度下的境内进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與烏茲別克市場准入要求對照：O'zStandart強制認證/聲明、O'zDSt/IEC 60335-2-24安全標準、國家能效計畫、R-600a製冷劑處理及在該國（非歐亞經濟聯盟）監管制度下的境內進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment body determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Uzbekistan technical regulations, O'zStandart certification/declaration requirements, applicable O'zDSt and adopted IEC/GOST standards, and energy programme thresholds with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行乌兹别克斯坦技术法规、O'zStandart认证/声明要求、适用的O'zDSt及采用的IEC/GOST标准以及能效计划门槛值。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行烏茲別克技術法規、O'zStandart認證/聲明要求、適用的O'zDSt及採用的IEC/GOST標準以及能效計畫門檻值。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers exporting to Uzbekistan face a national (non-EAEU) regulatory regime centred on O'zStandart: (1) mandatory conformity certification or declaration must be obtained from O'zStandart or an accredited Uzbek conformity-assessment body before customs clearance — Chinese CCC is not directly recognised; (2) electrical safety must be demonstrated against O'zDSt standards that adopt IEC 60335-2-24, and because Uzbekistan's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches China's nominal voltage and frequency, no voltage/frequency redesign is required (a genuine match — only documentary/test re-issuance applies); (3) energy efficiency is governed by national energy-saving programmes rather than the EU EEI/EPREL system; (4) R-600a refrigerant appliances are well-positioned but charge and documentation must align with the adopted IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant provisions; and (5) an in-country importer/representative is required to hold registration and certificates. All entries are informational pending source verification.
answer_first.zh: 向乌兹别克斯坦出口的中国家用电冰箱制造商面临以O'zStandart为核心的国家（非欧亚经济联盟）监管制度：（1）须在清关前向O'zStandart或乌方认可的合格评定机构取得强制性合格认证或声明——中国CCC不被直接承认；（2）电气安全须依据采用IEC 60335-2-24的O'zDSt标准证明，由于乌兹别克斯坦220/380 V 50 Hz电网与中国额定电压和频率一致，无需进行电压/频率重新设计（系真实匹配——仅涉及文件/检测重新签发）；（3）能效由国家节能计划管理，而非欧盟EEI/EPREL体系；（4）R-600a制冷剂器具具备良好条件，但充注量及文件须符合所采用的IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂规定；（5）须由境内进口商/代表持有注册及证书。所有条目均为信息性内容，有待来源核实。
answer_first.zht: 向烏茲別克出口的中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨以O'zStandart為核心的國家（非歐亞經濟聯盟）監管制度：（1）須在清關前向O'zStandart或烏方認可的合格評定機構取得強制性合格認證或聲明——中國CCC不被直接承認；（2）電氣安全須依據採用IEC 60335-2-24的O'zDSt標準證明，由於烏茲別克220/380 V 50 Hz電網與中國額定電壓和頻率一致，無需進行電壓/頻率重新設計（係真實匹配——僅涉及文件/檢測重新簽發）；（3）能效由國家節能計畫管理，而非歐盟EEI/EPREL體系；（4）R-600a製冷劑器具具備良好條件，但充注量及文件須符合所採用的IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑規定；（5）須由境內進口商/代表持有註冊及證書。所有條目均為資訊性內容，有待來源核實。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official O'zStandart, Lex.uz, IEC, and national-programme sources are preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
